seoTitle: Ultima East vs Ulupna — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ultima East and Ulupna. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ultima East vs Ulupna: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ultima East and Ulupna.
heading: Ultima East vs Ulupna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ultima East, Victoria and Ulupna, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ulupna has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Ultima East (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ultima East or Ulupna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ultima East has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Ulupna scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ultima East scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Ulupna scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ultima East or Ulupna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ulupna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
